name: Nexteer Automotive Group Ltd. R
summary: Nexteer Automotive Group Ltd. designs, manufactures, and supplies steering and driveline systems, as well as advanced driver-assistance systems (ADAS) and automated driving (AD) technologies for automotive manufacturers globally. The company's product portfolio includes electric power steering, hydraulic power steering, driveline systems, steering columns, and related software and hardware. Headquartered in Auburn Hills, Michigan, Nexteer serves a diverse range of customers, including major automotive OEMs worldwide.
